Core Competencies

Clinical Expertise

Operative Dentistry
Complex composite restorations, aesthetic fillings, and cavity management with precision and aesthetic sensitivity.
Patient Management
Cross-cultural communication across Arabic, English, and Russian. Strong patient psychology skills with a calm, empathetic approach.
Oral Prophylaxis
Professional scaling & polishing, oral hygiene education, and preventive care protocols to international standards.
Dental Radiology
X-ray technique, digital imaging, and radiographic interpretation for accurate diagnosis and treatment planning.
Chairside Assistance
Endodontics, Prosthodontics, Oral Surgery and Orthodontics support. Efficient clinical records and seamless patient flow management.
Infection Control
Adherence to international sterilization and safety protocols across dual healthcare systems (Russia & Egypt).
